name: Denardo Coleman
abstract: Denardo Ornette Coleman (born April 19, 1956) is an American jazz drummer. He is the son of Ornette Coleman and Jayne Cortez.

about_quotes.speaker: Lisa Parrott
about_quotes.evidence: I’ve even done stuff for Denardo Coleman, Ornette’s son, to run the full gamut of all sorts of stuff of copying I’ve done.
about_quotes.doc_title: Lisa Parrott interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 22, 2021

about_quotes.speaker: Schuller Gunther
about_quotes.evidence: In that concert he played almost no fast music... In the meantime, Denardo [Coleman] was going wild with his drums.
about_quotes.doc_title: Schuller Gunther — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
